summary: Build 207 is a LOCAL-ONLY real-customer pilot feedback-capture + next-decision packet. After Build 206 recorded the post-pilot observation and the POST_PILOT_FEEDBACK_REQUIRED decision, this build captures Jason's roofer-feedback summary (names/booleans/codes only) and prepares the next decision packet (NEXT_ACTION_REVIEW_REQUIRED) with four UNSIGNED recommended options. Jason left every bracketed feedback item unchanged in the Build 207 instructions, so each feedback field is recorded as not_provided_by_jason and feedback_captured=false (feedback still pending). It performs NO live action: no SMS, no Twilio, no network/external call, no retry, no roofer/homeowner contact, and reads/records no secret values, SIDs, tokens, credential values, phone numbers, or production data. It does NOT approve expansion, homeowner contact, live automation, or unrestricted launch. Launch remains pilot-gated, NOT unrestricted. Safety posture preserved: demo_ready_with_live_automation_disabled.

real_customer_pilot_feedback_evidence.feedback_capture_note: Jason left every bracketed feedback item unchanged in the Build 207 instructions; each field is recorded as not_provided_by_jason and feedback remains pending.
